title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to pull, run and chat with 70+ open-source LLMs locally (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma…).

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party async Python client (PyPI: ollama) that wraps the Ollama REST API for chat, generate, embed and pull.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official TypeScript/JavaScript client (npm: ollama) with Node & browser support for chatting with local Ollama models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (PyPI: langchain-ollama) exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) that talks to the local Ollama API; supports chat history, RAG, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library (Maven Central) providing typed builders for chat, generate, embed and model management.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python template showing how to build a RAG pipeline with Ollama embeddings and LangChain.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot that lets users pick any local Ollama model and chat with memory and parameter tuning.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses Ollama models for local code completion.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and model auto-pull.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and compose examples for running Ollama in Docker.

title: ollama-litellm
summary: LiteLLM proxy adapter that exposes Ollama models under OpenAI-compatible endpoints for unified access.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for building RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# client (NuGet: Ollama) supporting chat, generate, embed and listing models via REST.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate (ollama-rs) offering typed async bindings for chat, generate, embed and model ops.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop GUI for macOS/Windows/Linux to chat with Ollama models without browser.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Simple Discord bot that forwards user prompts to a local Ollama instance and streams replies.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models with optional system prompts.

title: ollama-cli-tools
summary: Collection of shell scripts to bulk pull, benchmark, and convert models for Ollama from Hugging Face.

title: ollama-model-gallery
summary: Curated community repo of Modelfiles and examples for running fine-tuned or custom models in Ollama.
